name: member-list-manager
description: LINE Webhook based member list manager system utilizing Google Apps Script.

scripts.test: node -e "global.PropertiesService = { getScriptProperties: () => ({ getProperty: () => 'MOCK' }) }; const fs = require('fs'); eval(fs.readFileSync('src/config.js', 'utf8') + fs.readFileSync('src/log.js', 'utf8') + fs.readFileSync('src/process.js', 'utf8') + fs.readFileSync('src/webhook.js', 'utf8') + fs.readFileSync('test.js', 'utf8')); runTests();"
